---
title: "Full Paper"
description: "A source-order browser for the BEDC paper HTML export."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .paper-browser {
    display: grid;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin: 1.2rem 0 2rem;
  }
  .paper-part {
    border-top: 1px solid #e2e2e2;
    padding-top: 1rem;
  }
  .paper-part h2 {
    margin: 0 0 0.7rem;
    font-size: 1.25rem;
  }
  .paper-chapter {
    margin: 0.85rem 0;
  }
  .paper-chapter h3 {
    margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #444;
  }
  .paper-list {
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    display: grid;
    gap: 0.35rem;
  }
  .paper-list li {
    display: flex;
    align-items: baseline;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
    padding: 0.35rem 0;
  }
  .paper-list a {
    font-weight: 600;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .paper-source {
    color: #777;
    font: 0.82rem/1.35 ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
    overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  }
  .paper-status {
    color: #666;
    font-size: 0.9rem;
  }
</style>
<div id="paper-browser" class="paper-browser">
  <p class="paper-status">Loading paper sources...</p>
</div>
<script>
const root = document.getElementById("paper-browser");

function groupBy(items, key) {
  const groups = new Map();
  for (const item of items) {
    const value = item[key] || "Unsorted";
    if (!groups.has(value)) groups.set(value, []);
    groups.get(value).push(item);
  }
  return groups;
}

function makeRow(row) {
  const li = document.createElement("li");
  const link = document.createElement("a");
  link.href = row.html_url || "#";
  link.textContent = row.title || row.slug || row.source;
  const source = document.createElement("span");
  source.className = "paper-source";
  source.textContent = row.source || "";
  li.append(link, source);
  return li;
}

function render(rows) {
  root.replaceChildren();
  const byPart = groupBy(rows, "part");
  for (const [part, partRows] of byPart) {
    const section = document.createElement("section");
    section.className = "paper-part";
    const h2 = document.createElement("h2");
    h2.textContent = part;
    section.appendChild(h2);
    const byChapter = groupBy(partRows, "chapter");
    for (const [chapter, chapterRows] of byChapter) {
      const chapterEl = document.createElement("div");
      chapterEl.className = "paper-chapter";
      if (chapter && chapter !== "Unsorted") {
        const h3 = document.createElement("h3");
        h3.textContent = chapter;
        chapterEl.appendChild(h3);
      }
      const ul = document.createElement("ul");
      ul.className = "paper-list";
      chapterRows
        .slice()
        .sort((a, b) => (a.order || 0) - (b.order || 0))
        .forEach(row => ul.appendChild(makeRow(row)));
      chapterEl.appendChild(ul);
      section.appendChild(chapterEl);
    }
    root.appendChild(section);
  }
}

fetch("data/paper_sources.json")
  .then(response => {
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}`);
    return response.json();
  })
  .then(rows => render(Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : []))
  .catch(error => {
    root.innerHTML = "";
    const p = document.createElement("p");
    p.className = "paper-status";
    p.textContent = `Unable to load paper_sources.json: ${error.message}`;
    root.appendChild(p);
  });
</script>
```
